requirements: Subsystem module: Dorsal Control Module x 2
Snap-in dorsal electronics and battery module, tool-less lid, wireless board bay, service label and cable exits
Vehicle context: Wearable force-feedback exo-glove pair for VR grasp resistance, serviceable actuator cartridges, linkages, wrist band, and dorsal control module
Discipline: Electronics - Role: Controller board on back-of-hand with standoffs and connector orientation
Return path and grounding intent: Good
Interfaces: Wrist Band, Tool-less Lid, Wireless Board Bay
Internal features: Controller Board, Standoff, Connector Edge, Battery Holder, Lid Lock, Cable Exit Port, Sensor Pocket
Integration opportunities: Enhanced cooling fins, Additional data connectors, Integrated LED indicators
Manufacturing strategy: FDM + SLS, Vertical orientation for optimal print quality, Visual and dimensional checks post-print
Verification focus: Mass verification, Electrical connectivity test, Mechanical integrity test

risk.mit: Evaluate adding additional data connectors for future-proofing
